message:
chore: sync conformance archives, legacy Python ref, and add TUI interaction test

- Update 5 Python reference conformance test run archives with latest
  execution results
- Sync legacy Python MCP agent mail code reference
- Add tests/e2e/test_tui_interaction.sh for TUI interaction testing

Skipped ephemeral: agent-mail-rust-8766.log, nonexistent_path_xyz.db.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# test_tui_interaction.sh - E2E test suite wrapper for TUI interaction flows.
+#
+# Runs the implementation in scripts/e2e_tui_interaction.sh so the suite can be invoked via:
+#   ./scripts/e2e_test.sh tui_interaction
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+
+# Safety: default to keeping temp dirs so shared harness cleanup doesn't run `rm -rf`.
+: "${AM_E2E_KEEP_TMP:=1}"
+
+bash "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../../scripts/e2e_tui_interaction.sh"
